name: 1/4-wave wire on SMA (~2 dBi)
form_factor: ~8 cm wire (915 MHz) / ~8.6 cm (868 MHz) / ~17 cm (433 MHz)
best_for: The cheapest legit upgrade. A straight piece of solid-core wire at the right length beats most stock ducks.
watch_out: No counterpoise unless you provide one — best when the radio body or a ground plane sits below it.
